channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Shipping in Strait of Hormuz still at a trickle despite US-Iran ceasefire
item.description: Washington and Tehran accuse each other of not honouring truce agreement.

item.title: Iran war live: Israeli attacks on Lebanon threaten US-Iran ceasefire talks
item.description: Iran’s parliament speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf warns ‘time is running out’ amid Israel’s attacks on Lebanon.

item.title: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei says ‘we seek compensation, not war’
item.description: Iranian state TV has read out a message from new Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei which says Iran ‘does not want war’.

item.title: US-Iran ceasefire: Uncertainty over what’s next
item.description: Two‑week US‑Iran ceasefire pauses war; “who won?” unresolved as Hormuz, Lebanon strikes, Iran capabilities persist.

item.title: Hospitals in Beirut struggle to deal with casualties after Israeli attacks
item.description: Doctors warn of worsening crises as vital supplies run low and Israeli attacks devastate Beirut and surrounding areas.

item.title: Gaza journalists mourn Al Jazeera’s Wishah, killed by Israel
item.description: Wishah is latest Al Jazeera journalist to be killed by Israel in Gaza since the start of the war in October 2023.

item.title: Khamenei says Tehran ‘astonished the world’ during US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description: In a statement read out on television, Mojtaba Khamenei said Tehran will 'demand compensation' for war damages.

item.title: Iran: Strait of Hormuz open with restrictions
item.description: Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister says the Strait of Hormuz is open but ships must coordinate with Iranian forces.

item.title: Why is Hezbollah a sticking point in the Iran ceasefire?
item.description: Lebanese armed group is an ally of Tehran but still under attack from Israel.

item.title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
item.description: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.
